snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.independence: UI Design independently verified the exact replacement hash and made no edits. It blocked the prior candidate on two intermediate-state defects, then re-audited and accepted the repaired text, picker, drop, restart, locale and accessibility behavior.

dimensions.summary: The first-Home guide stays inside Home, explicit choices persist per vault, and model repair remains one contextual action rather than a new destination or recurring prompt.
API, Onboarding, Settings and UI owners agree on machine-local dismissal, preserve-first Pi continuation and one status owner across text, picker and drop states.
Four exact tests bind preference, guide, stable source wait and intermediate drop ownership only to existing partial settings, UI, Job and Exit rows; statuses do not change.
The batch closes three adjacent first-run and Home status defects without changing durable Agent orchestration, Dataset routing or the remaining Public Alpha feature and platform backlog.
Four existing Owner sections and one acceptance manifest absorb the observable delta; no new document, PRD rewrite, Playbook expansion, prototype refresh or status promotion is introduced.

verification.evidence: The final exact Public Alpha Home usability candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five documentation-quality dimensions.

verification.command: npm run verify:contracts && npx vitest run tests/unit/home-agent-conversation-ui.test.ts tests/unit/desktop-shell-contract.test.ts tests/unit/local-settings.test.ts tests/unit/schemas.test.ts
verification.evidence: All four contract gates and negative fixtures pass; 4 focused files and 48 tests prove the typed onboarding channel, machine-local restart persistence, one model action and picker/drop intermediate-state ownership.
Semantic lock schema v3 contains 1,152 claims; four exact evidence additions project only to existing partial rows, while every Requirement, Exit and phase state remains unchanged.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass after the net-small Owner and acceptance projection, without a new governed document or unrelated contract expansion.

coordination.taskTitle: Public Alpha first-Home and source-wait status ownership
coordination.compatibility: The candidate keeps preserve-first unified ingress and Pi-selected Dataset work unchanged. It adds one bounded machine-local per-vault guide preference and consolidates existing Home status ownership without durable schema, dependency, provider, permission or phase changes.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze the exact replacement after one consolidated HOLD repair. UI Design accepted the replacement hash; Product Planning synchronized only affected Owners and existing acceptance rows before one semantic and snapshot bind.

nonBlockingRisks: The guide dismissal is intentionally machine-local and does not travel with backup or another device.
Broader Activity, progress, non-Agent cancellation and permission UI remain open outside this status-ownership batch.
Signed Windows and full installed-platform accessibility evidence remain open.
This batch does not add Dataset materialization without Pi or expand the structured-data feature surface.
